allow: Bash(node -e "const f = require\('./src/config/robots/franka_panda.json'\); console.log\('dof:', f.dof, '| joints:', f.dhParams.length, '| limits:', f.jointLimits.length\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; f=json.load\(open\('src/config/robots/franka_panda.json'\)\); print\('dof:', f['dof'], '| dhParams:', len\(f['dhParams']\), '| limits:', len\(f['jointLimits']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['dependencies','devDependencies'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('typesVersions', d.get\('types', d.get\('main', 'not found'\)\)\)\)")
